name: Fashion & Style
description: Fashion brands, stylists, clothing creators, accessories

tone_rules.statement: Write with confidence and editorial flair — short, sharp, impactful sentences
Use visual language that evokes texture, color, silhouette, and mood
Reference culture, art, architecture — fashion doesn't exist in isolation
Never over-explain — let the image do 70% of the work, text adds context and attitude

principles.statement: Style is a point of view, not a trend report — have one and defend it
Authenticity over aspiration: show real people, real occasions, real wear
Sustainability and ethics are non-negotiable topics — address them honestly
Craft and detail deserve close-up attention — zoom in on what makes a piece special

gold_examples.statement: This jacket was designed for the woman who arrives last and is remembered longest.
Deadstock fabric from a 1970s Venetian mill. There are 200 of these coats in the world.

discard_examples.statement: Check out our new collection! Great prices and fast shipping on all orders over €50.
Stylish and trendy pieces for the modern woman. Shop now and save up to 40%!
